CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiff More Sf Llc???S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To Local Rule 6.6 (D-7)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 03:13:33 p.m. and concluding at 03:25:39 p.m.

Plaintiff More SF LLC represented by Tara C. Dudum, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Fixing.World, Inc. not appearing.

Order Granting Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application Requesting Waiver of the Witness Requirement filed Jul-13-2023.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing, including the Complaint for Breach of Contract filed Oct-07-2022 and the First Amended Complaint for Breach of Contract filed Jan-06-2023. Court finds the following:

1. Operative Pleading is the First Amended Complaint filed Jan-06-2023
2. Default was entered as to Defendant on Mar-29-2023
3. Defendant was served with Complaint on Jan-30-2023
4. DOES 1-50 were DISMISSED on Apr-19-2023
5. Request for Entry of Court Judgment filed Apr-19-2023

Court has reviewed the Declaration of Matthew Kaftor in Support of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing re: Plaintiff's Motion for Default Judgment Against Fixing.World, Inc. and its exhibits filed Jul-17-2023.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit A - Master Services Contract
Plaintiff's Exhibit B - More SF - Fixing.World Time Tracking
Plaintiff's Exhibit C - Invoice dated Feb-16-2022 with a Due Date of Feb-22-2022
Plaintiff's Exhibit D - Itemization
Plaintiff's Exhibit E - Text Messages

The matter is submitted.
Court finds Plaintiff has proven allegations in its complaint by the Declaration of Matthew Kaftor in Support of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing re: Plaintiff's Motion for Default Judgment Against Fixing.World, Inc. and its exhibits filed Jul-17-2023.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff More SF LLC, and against Fixing.World, Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $21,600.43
2. Prejudgment Interest: $3,000.38
3. Attorney Fees: $5,620.00
4. Costs: $695.83

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $30,916.64

Proposed judgment signed.
